programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Antiques guru Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) investigates a murder after an old college friend becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Faced with the potential of Israel's complete destruction, Prime Minister Golda Meir must navigate overwhelming odds, a skeptical cabinet and a complex relationship with U.S. Secretary of State Henry Kissinger as millions of lives hang in the balance during the tense 19 days of the Yom Kippur War in 1973.

programme.title: Small Things Like These
programme.desc: In 1985 coal merchant Bill Furlong uncovers disturbing secrets in a small Irish town that's controlled by the Roman Catholic Church.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: When Paddington discovers his beloved aunt has gone missing from the Home for Retired Bears, he and the Brown family head to the jungles of Peru to find her. Determined to solve the mystery, they soon stumble across a legendary treasure as they make their way through the rainforests of the Amazon.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Born into wrestling, Jeff Jarrett builds Total Nonstop Action Wrestling from scratch, battling the WWE through a decade of success and controversy.

programme.title: Sweetness
programme.desc: When a superfan learns that her rock-star idol is spiraling into addiction, she makes it her mission to save him, whether he wants her help or not. However, when her desperate plan spins out of control, she kidnaps him in a delusional attempt to fix him. What started as compassion soon turns into captivity as she locks him away in the name of love.

programme.title: Please Don't Destroy: The Treasure of Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: It follows three friends who live together. When they realize that they don't like their life trajectory, they set off to find a gold treasure that is rumored to be buried in the nearby mountain.

programme.title: It Lives Inside
programme.desc: Desperate to fit in at school, Sam rejects her East Indian culture and family to be like everyone else. However, when a mythological demonic spirit latches onto her former best friend, she must come to terms with her heritage to defeat it.

programme.title: Beating Hearts
programme.desc: Clotaire falls for his schoolmate Jackie, charmed by her fearless spirit and sharp wit. As first love blossoms between the two, gang violence entices him into a darker path and destroys everything when he is charged with a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Late Bloomer
programme.desc: Jasmeet, Chippy and Neal hit the club to celebrate a recent ad campaign featuring Jasmeet; they're building on his modest success by dressing and spending for the job he wants; it escalates quickly as Jasmeet finds himself in debt.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent meets a new member of his extended family; Karen helps Wanda showcase her math skills; Ruby makes menu changes.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar tries to catch a mouse; Brent and Hank invent a new game.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash and Mags support each other through new challenges while treating an older couple who show up at the hospital glued together; Theo is called out by Liz Bergeron about his repeated inability to follow hospital rules.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: When James Bond's (Daniel Craig) latest assignment goes terribly wrong, it leads to a calamitous turn of events: Undercover agents around the world are exposed, and MI6 is attacked, forcing M (Judi Dench) to relocate the agency. programme.title: Dress for Success
programme.desc: A refugee turned fashionista lawyer launches her own brand of designer philanthropy.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: A shooting outside the hospital injures April and leaves the ED shaken up; Halstead returns after a stint in the witness relocation program; Charles and Elsa have an emotional confrontation; Bekker is reluctant to attend an event honoring Rhodes.

programme.title: Duster
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a getaway driver encounters a tenacious FBI agent who wants to take his crime family down.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead takes heat for making an unauthorized move to treat his pregnant patient; Choi becomes personally invested when treating a homeless veteran; Rhodes and Bekker deal with a patient who desperately needs a liver transplant.

programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after disappearing for 10 years, but they've changed for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.desc: The murder of a gay couple in rural California leads investigators into the world of hate crimes.

Members of the 118 attempt to rescue a wellness retreat guru after his followers turn on him; an emergency call at an upscale hair salon; Maddie contemplates returning to work, Eddie and May make decisions about their future.

On one of the hottest days of the year, the first responders must deal with harrowing incidents all around the city; Buck gets a surprise visit from his sister; Athena questions her relationship with Bobby; Buck worries about a handsome new hire.

A massive earthquake rocks Los Angeles; the first responders rush to rescue victims from a crumbling high-rise hotel; Athena must deal with wreckage from a collapsed freeway overpass; Maddie faces her first crisis as a 911 dispatcher.

The first responders continue to deal with the fallout of a massive earthquake; Athena tries to keep the peace as Bobby and team continue to rescue victims from a collapsing high-rise hotel; Maddie must help a pregnant couple deliver their baby.
